assertion_results.text: Output specifies internal/product/domain/contract/ as the correct location
assertion_results.evidence: Output specifies 'internal/product/domain/contracts.go or internal/product/domain/product_repository.go' — files in domain/ root, not the 'domain/contract/' subdirectory

assertion_results.text: Output states the interface must be owned by the domain layer
assertion_results.evidence: Output states 'the domain layer owns the ports (interfaces)'

assertion_results.text: Output states the infrastructure layer is responsible for implementing the interface
assertion_results.evidence: Output states 'the infrastructure layer provides the adapters (implementations)'

assertion_results.text: Output does NOT suggest placing the interface in the infrastructure or application layer
assertion_results.evidence: No suggestion of placing interface in infrastructure or application layer
